title: Better Undead Horses
description:
Buffs the Skeleton and Zombie Horses to be comparable to a maxed horse
as well as buffing Camel Husks
body:
A simple datapack that buffs Zombie Horses and Skeleton Horses to have comparable stats to a max horse. Skeleton Horses are very fragile, but very fast. Zombie Horses are slower, but very very tanky. And also don't kick you off underwater anymore.
Camel Husks become incredibly bulky and have a higher jump, but move slower.
